channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Deadly Russian strikes hit Kyiv as Zelenskyy urges U.S. for urgent aid
item.description: A large-scale overnight Russian missile and drone attack on Ukraine killed over a dozen people and injured more than 100, officials reported.

item.title: Senior Iranian officer says return to war with U.S. appears "inevitable"
item.description: Prospects for a U.S.-Iran deal fade as the Israel-Hezbollah war continues, despite Trump's claim of a ceasefire agreement.

item.title: Hegseth blocks promotions of several Navy officers to one-star rank
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth blocked the promotions of several senior Navy officers selected for one-star admiral by a board.

item.title: Iowa police believe man shot and killed six relatives, then himself
item.description: Authorities in Iowa are investigating the fatal shootings of six people, believed to have been killed by a relative who then took his own life when confronted.
